_publications._publicationTitle: Genomic Patterns of Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor (MPNST) Evolution Correlate with Clinical Outcome and Are Detectable in Cell-Free DNA.

_contextSnippet: We detected somatic biallelic inactivation of CDKN2A in 40/64 (63%) NF1-related MPNSTs and in 17 of 31 (55%) sporadic MPNSTs
details: Detected somatic biallelic inactivation of CDKN2A in 40/64 (63%) NF1-related MPNSTs and in 17 of 31 (55%) sporadic MPNSTs
